prompt: Build a knowledge graph about people and companies: 1) Create entities: Alice (type: person, observations: ['senior engineer']), Bob (type: person, observations: ['product manager']), Carol (type: person, observations: ['designer']), Google (type: company, observations: ['search engine giant']), and Microsoft (type: company, observations: ['makes Windows']). 2) Create relations: Alice works_at Google, Bob works_at Microsoft, Carol works_at Google. 3) Now search for 'Google' and list all people who work there. Summarize the results.
